title: Spectrophotometric Study of Copper and Thorium Complexes of Quinizarin-2-Sulphonic Acid
author: D. P. Joshi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Spectrophotometric study shows complex formation of quinizarin--sulphonic acid with Cu (II) in the ratio 1 : 1 and with Th (IV) in 1 : 1 and l : 2 (metal : reagent). Log K values of the complexes are respectively 3·3, 3·0 and 6·1 at 20°.
steps_raw: Spectrophotometric study shows complex formation of quinizarin--sulphonic acid with Cu (II) in the ratio 1 : 1 and with Th (IV) in 1 : 1 and l : 2 (metal : reagent). Log K values of the complexes are respectively 3·3, 3·0 and 6·1 at 20°.
